summary: Iteration 41 - Tested EDITABLE API Keys Admin functionality. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All core features working. Fixed bug: SENDER_EMAIL undefined in emails.py send_otp_email function.

issues: Clipboard copy shows browser permission error overlay in headless mode - not an app bug, expected headless browser limitation

seed_data_creation: Test keys saved/restored during API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: API Keys Admin is now fully EDITABLE. Keys saved via admin show source='admin' and 'Custom' badge in UI. Keys from .env show source='env'. All 8 keys: stripe_api_key, smtp_host, smtp_port, smtp_user, smtp_pass, sender_email, receipt_email, resend_api_key. Key manager reads MongoDB first, falls back to .env.

bug_fixed.issue: SENDER_EMAIL was referenced but not defined in send_otp_email function
bug_fixed.fix: Changed from_email=SENDER_EMAIL to from_email=cfg['sender'] using config from _get_smtp_config()

test_classes: TestApiKeysGetEndpoint (5 tests) - GET endpoint returns all 8 keys
TestApiKeysPutEndpoint (4 tests) - PUT endpoint saves to MongoDB
TestApiKeysPersistence (2 tests) - PUT then GET shows source='admin'
TestEmailOTPAfterKeyManagerIntegration (1 test) - email OTP still works
